final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: clean flat editorial design, brand identity reference sheet, inspired by Japanese/Chinese minimalist graphic design studios — think Nendo or Studio Takeuma restraint applied to a warm autumnal palette
Subject: brand color system (primary + secondary swatches with hex/CMYK labels), typography specimen showing Chinese and Latin typefaces, brand name "染秋 (RAN QIU)" as wordmark, brief tagline area referencing seasonal botanicals (osmanthus, persimmon, maple, oolong tea) and Eastern spices (cinnamon, sandalwood, amber)
Composition: portrait-format style guide layout, organized in clear horizontal bands — top: wordmark lockup; middle: primary and secondary color swatches in a row with labels; bottom: typeface specimen lines in both Chinese and Latin scripts; generous white/off-white margins throughout
Color palette: primary colors drawn from deep autumn — burnt sienna, persimmon orange, osmanthus gold, ink black; secondary/accent colors — muted sage, pale rice paper cream, warm amber; swatches displayed as solid filled rectangles with color name and code beneath each
Materials/textures: flat matte finish, subtle paper grain texture on background evoking traditional xuan paper, no gradients
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: all color swatches must be clearly labeled; typography specimen must show at least one Chinese-compatible serif or brush-influenced typeface and one clean Latin serif; layout must read as a single cohesive brand reference sheet at reduced size
Avoid: photographic elements, gradients, neon or cool-toned colors, generic Behance flat mockup style, drop shadows, decorative clutter inconsistent with Eastern minimalism
